title: 2026 Best Supporting Actor Oscar Predictions
text: The article predicts Stellan Skarsgård will win the Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his role in Sentimental Value. The nominees are Delroy Lindo (Sinners), Jacob Elordi (Frankenstein), Stellan Skarsgård (Sentimental Value), Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro (One Battle After Another). Neil Turitz explains that while Lindo's nomination celebrates his legendary career, Skarsgård remains the clear frontrunner. He notes that the actor who I think is going to win this one wasn't even nominated by SAG-AFTRA, suggesting divergence between SAG recognition and Oscar momentum. The critic argues Skarsgård delivers a transcendent performance as an aging filmmaker confronting his legacy. His nuanced portrayal of a selfish man grappling with regret constitutes one of the two or three best performances of any kind this year. Vote-splitting between Penn and del Toro for One Battle After Another solidifies Skarsgård's advantage, while Elordi's relative newcomer status works against him despite strong work. Prediction: Skarsgård to win.
